description:
Mateo Ćorluka bio je gost LOOD podcasta gdje smo razgovorali o dugovječnosti i o tome što je to ljudsko zdravlje. Zdravlje je sve popularnija tematika kako podcasta, tako i knjiga raznih autora.

#lood #podcast44

SPONZOR: 
Podcast studio Hrvatska: https://www.podcaststudio.hr/

PODCAST PLATFORME:
Website: https://www.lood.net/
Youtube main channel: https://www.youtube.com/c/loodyt
Youtube clips: https://bit.ly/34Hsqu7
Spotify: https://spoti.fi/3HRj0dS
Apple: https://apple.co/3rOhMdK
Google: https://bit.ly/3JpJB23
Anchor: https://bit.ly/3sIPMaL

DRUŠTVENE MREŽE:

TikTok: https://www.tiktok.com/@lood.tt
Facebook: https://www.facebook.com/lood.fb
Linkedin: https://www.linkedin.com/company/loodli

VODITELJ — VINKO MIHALJEVIĆ
Twitter: https://twitter.com/vinkomi
Linkedin: https://www.linkedin.com/in/vinkomiha...

GOST — Mateo Ćorluka
Youtube: https://www.youtube.com/c/HumanLABPodcast  
Linkedin: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mateo-%C4%87orluka/ 
Facebook: https://hr-hr.facebook.com/mateo.corluka 
Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/mateozx95/


TEME
(00:00) Uvod 
(00:25) Tko je Mateo Ćorluka i Human lab 
(04:35) Uobičajeni dan na hitnom prijemu Rebra 
(09:05) Test osobnosti stresa  
(13:55) Empatija prema pacijentu  
(22:25) Uloga zdravstvenog sustava i vlastita briga o zdravlju  
(27:07) Genetika  
(32:45) Prehrana, tjelovježba, san  
(41:04) Balans u životu 
(55:20) Biohacking  
(1:00:00) Tai Lopez – Čitanje knjige  
(1:10:45) Ovisnost o primanje informacija iz okoline  
(1:14:40) Rich Roll, Tom Bilyeu i Tim Ferriss   
(1:19:25) Andrew Tate / Google i Meta

(1:31:00) Kraj
